title: lobelia dopatrioides var. kradungensis
intro: Lobelia dopatrioides var. kradungensis, also known as Kradung lobelia, is a plant species belonging to the family Campanulaceae. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Kradung lobelia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats, making it a popular remedy in folk medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried and used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
